summary.en: Keeps the boss updated and routes important requests
summary.ar: يتابع التحديثات المهمة ويوصل الطلبات لصاحب القرار

summary.en: Watches material requests, POs, and suppliers
summary.ar: يتابع طلبات المواد وأوامر الشراء والموردين

summary.en: Watches collections, invoices, and payment follow-ups
Watches quotations, targets, tenders, and sales follow-ups
summary.ar: يتابع عروض الأسعار والأهداف والمناقصات ومتابعات المبيعات

summary.en: Watches shipments, stores, and delivery delays
Watches content approvals and publishing activity
Watches project follow-ups and delivery signals
Watches tenants, rent reminders, and lease activity
summary.ar: يتابع المستأجرين وتذكيرات الإيجار وحركة العقود

summary.en: Watches vehicles, documents, and fleet incidents
Watches HR documents, expiry reminders, and staff reports
summary.ar: يتابع وثائق الموارد البشرية والتنبيهات وتقارير الموظفين

automations.name: Memory Dreaming Promotion
automations.description: Promote weighted short-term recalls into MEMORY.md (limit=10, minScore=0.800, minRecallCount=3, minUniqueQueries=3, recencyHalfLifeDays=14, maxAgeDays=30).

displayDescription.en: Promote weighted short-term recalls into MEMORY.md (limit=10, minScore=0.800, minRecallCount=3, minUniqueQueries=3, recencyHalfLifeDays=14, maxAgeDays=30).
displayDescription.ar: يراجع أهم الملاحظات القصيرة ويرقي المفيد منها إلى الذاكرة الدائمة.

automations.name: Boss Dashboard Live Publisher
automations.description: Every 5 min: publishes a sanitized dashboard summary to GitHub so the Vercel phone dashboard shows latest safe numbers.

displayDescription.en: Every 5 min: publishes a sanitized dashboard summary to GitHub so the Vercel phone dashboard shows latest safe numbers.
displayDescription.ar: ينشر ملخصاً آمناً ومحدثاً للوحة المدير حتى تظهر آخر الأرقام على الجوال.

automations.name: Procurement Material Request Watcher - Every 30 min
automations.description: Checks ERP for new Material Requests every 30 min 08-17 and announces them to the procurement group.

displayName.en: Procurement Material Request Watcher - Every 30 min

displayDescription.en: Checks ERP for new Material Requests every 30 min 08-17 and announces them to the procurement group.
displayDescription.ar: يفحص ERP بحثاً عن طلبات مواد جديدة ويبلغ مجموعة المشتريات.

automations.name: RM Barcode Allocator
automations.description: End of every working day (17:30 Sat-Thu): scans BCI-Raw Material submitted items created in the last 30 days, assigns next free RM###### barcode + uploaded Code128 image to any item missing one. Silent automation, no outbound messaging.

displayDescription.en: End of every working day (17:30 Sat-Thu): scans BCI-Raw Material submitted items created in the last 30 days, assigns next free RM###### barcode + uploaded Code128 image to any item missing one. Silent automation, no outbound messaging.
displayDescription.ar: يفحص مواد BCI الخام الجديدة ويخصص الباركود التالي المتاح لها.

automations.name: ERP Monitor
automations.description: checks for new employees, items, POs to check, leave requests, new projects → notifies boss via WhatsApp.

displayDescription.en: checks for new employees, items, POs to check, leave requests, new projects → notifies boss via WhatsApp.
displayDescription.ar: يتابع الموظفين والمواد وأوامر الشراء والإجازات والمشاريع الجديدة ويبلغ Eng. Muhammad.

automations.name: ChemAnalyst Weekly Price Scraper
automations.description: Weekly Saturday 06:00: pulls quarterly USD/MT prices from ChemAnalyst public pages for caustic soda, methanol, polyols, MDI, TDI, PU resin. Feeds the RFQ decider so BCI quotes that match a stale LPR can be flagged when the underlying commodity has moved 10%+ since last buy.

displayDescription.en: Weekly Saturday 06:00: pulls quarterly USD/MT prices from ChemAnalyst public pages for caustic soda, methanol, polyols, MDI, TDI, PU resin. Feeds the RFQ decider so BCI quotes that match a stale LPR can be flagged when the underlying commodity has moved 10%+ since last buy.
displayDescription.ar: يجلب أسعار المواد الرئيسية من ChemAnalyst لاستخدامها في قرارات عروض الموردين.

automations.name: DN/SO EOD Digest
automations.description: one end-of-day digest per salesman summarizing today's new Delivery Notes and Sales Orders. (Was every 30 min 8-17; reduced to cut nag volume - re-enable old expr if reverting.)

displayDescription.en: one end-of-day digest per salesman summarizing today's new Delivery Notes and Sales Orders. (Was every 30 min 8-17; reduced to cut nag volume - re-enable old expr if reverting.)
displayDescription.ar: يرسل لكل مندوب ملخص نهاية اليوم عن أوامر البيع وسندات التسليم الجديدة.

automations.name: Shipment Delay Checker
automations.description: checks for delayed shipments → DMs driver and alerts delivery group.

displayDescription.en: checks for delayed shipments → DMs driver and alerts delivery group.
displayDescription.ar: يتابع الشحنات المتأخرة وينبه السائق ومجموعة التوصيل.

automations.name: BCI Store DN/SO Reconciliation
automations.description: Every 30 min from 07:00 to 19:00 Riyadh daily: checks new BCI Delivery Notes in Completed/To Bill state, compares items and quantities with linked Sales Orders, and asks the relevant store WhatsApp group only when something is suspicious. Follow-up replies can still be handled by the delivery agent outside this window. First run bootstraps without sending old backlog.

displayName.ar: مطابقة سندات تسليم BCI مع أوامر البيع

displayDescription.en: Every 30 min from 07:00 to 19:00 Riyadh daily: checks new BCI Delivery Notes in Completed/To Bill state, compares items and quantities with linked Sales Orders, and asks the relevant store WhatsApp group only when something is suspicious. Follow-up replies can still be handled by the delivery agent outside this window. First run bootstraps without sending old backlog.
displayDescription.ar: يقارن سندات التسليم المكتملة مع أوامر البيع المرتبطة للتأكد من الكميات والمواد.

automations.name: BCI Store WhatsApp DN Creation Reminders
automations.description: Every hour from 07:00 to 19:00 Riyadh daily: checks BCI store WhatsApp delivery requests that still have no Delivery Note in ERP and reminds the original sender in the relevant store group.

displayName.en: BCI Store WhatsApp DN Creation Reminders
displayName.ar: تذكير إنشاء سندات التسليم من مجموعة المستودع

displayDescription.en: Every hour from 07:00 to 19:00 Riyadh daily: checks BCI store WhatsApp delivery requests that still have no Delivery Note in ERP and reminds the original sender in the relevant store group.
displayDescription.ar: يتابع طلبات التوصيل في مجموعة المستودع التي لم يصبح لها سند تسليم في ERP.

automations.name: BCI Store WhatsApp Delayed Intake Flush
automations.description: Every minute from 07:00 to 19:00 Riyadh daily: flushes delayed BCI store media/screenshot messages after the burst window, sending at most one classified reply per sender burst.

displayName.en: BCI Store WhatsApp Delayed Intake Flush

displayDescription.en: Every minute from 07:00 to 19:00 Riyadh daily: flushes delayed BCI store media/screenshot messages after the burst window, sending at most one classified reply per sender burst.
displayDescription.ar: يجمع رسائل وصور المستودع المتأخرة ثم يرسل رداً مصنفاً واحداً بعد اكتمال الرسالة.

automations.name: MR Lead Time Checker
automations.description: sends ONE overdue MR per cycle to procurement group, re-alerts every 3 days.

displayDescription.en: sends ONE overdue MR per cycle to procurement group, re-alerts every 3 days.
displayDescription.ar: يرسل طلب مادة متأخر واحد في كل دورة إلى مجموعة المشتريات ويعيد التنبيه كل 3 أيام.

automations.name: Raw Material Shortage Reminder
automations.description: Daily 09:08: reminds Javed by personal WhatsApp DM about BCI-Raw Material items below safety stock/short/projected short, then sends one next-day follow-up if no Purchase Material Request exists.

displayDescription.en: Daily 09:08: reminds Javed by personal WhatsApp DM about BCI-Raw Material items below safety stock/short/projected short, then sends one next-day follow-up if no Purchase Material Request exists.
displayDescription.ar: ينبه جافيد بالمواد الخام الأقل من حد الأمان أو المتوقع نقصها، مع متابعة في اليوم التالي عند الحاجة.

automations.name: Quotation Follow-up
automations.description: reminds salesmen about open quotations not converted to orders (24h first, then every 3 days). Action-time slot - after target-tracker hook lands at 08:00, salesmen are settled in and ready to call customers about live quotes.

displayDescription.en: reminds salesmen about open quotations not converted to orders (24h first, then every 3 days). Action-time slot - after target-tracker hook lands at 08:00, salesmen are settled in and ready to call customers about live quotes.
displayDescription.ar: يذكر مندوبي المبيعات بعروض الأسعار المفتوحة التي لم تتحول إلى أوامر بيع.

automations.name: Salesman Target Tracker
automations.description: per-salesman MTD invoiced net sales vs monthly target, rank, top customers, plus a warm daily site-visit expectation. Uses Sales Invoice posting_date/net_total so totals align with accounting. Voice+text lands before customer-facing time.

displayDescription.en: per-salesman MTD invoiced net sales vs monthly target, rank, top customers, plus a warm daily site-visit expectation. Uses Sales Invoice posting_date/net_total so totals align with accounting. Voice+text lands before customer-facing time.
displayDescription.ar: يرسل لكل مندوب مبيعات تحديث الشهر الحالي، ترتيبه، أبرز العملاء، وتذكير الزيارات اليومية.

automations.name: Salesman Visit Tracker - Noon
automations.description: nudges active BCI salesmen who have not logged any Salesperson site visit yet today (no numbers in the message) and sends Sameh a team roll-up when his team is behind. Daily minimum (8) is judged internally, never stated to salesmen.

displayDescription.en: nudges active BCI salesmen who have not logged any Salesperson site visit yet today (no numbers in the message) and sends Sameh a team roll-up when his team is behind. Daily minimum (8) is judged internally, never stated to salesmen.
displayDescription.ar: ينبه المندوبين الذين لم يسجلوا زيارة ميدانية اليوم ويرسل ملخص الفريق عند الحاجة.

when.ar: كل يوم بعد الظهر عند 12:00 (عدا الجمعة)

automations.name: Salesman Visit Tracker - 15:30
automations.description: nudges active BCI salesmen still below the internal daily minimum of submitted Salesperson site visits (no numbers in the message) and sends Sameh a team roll-up when his team is behind. Daily minimum (8) is judged internally, never stated to salesmen.

displayDescription.en: nudges active BCI salesmen still below the internal daily minimum of submitted Salesperson site visits (no numbers in the message) and sends Sameh a team roll-up when his team is behind. Daily minimum (8) is judged internally, never stated to salesmen.
displayDescription.ar: ينبه المندوبين الذين ما زالوا أقل من الحد اليومي للزيارات المسجلة.

when.ar: كل يوم بعد الظهر عند 15:30 (عدا الجمعة)

automations.name: Salesman Visit Tracker - Boss EOD
automations.description: sends boss an exception summary (with counts) for active BCI salesmen still below the daily minimum of 8 submitted Salesperson site visits.

displayDescription.en: sends boss an exception summary (with counts) for active BCI salesmen still below the daily minimum of 8 submitted Salesperson site visits.
displayDescription.ar: يرسل ملخص الاستثناءات لـ Eng. Muhammad عن المندوبين الأقل من الحد اليومي للزيارات.

automations.name: Rent Installment Reminder
automations.description: sends 15-day-ahead WhatsApp reminders to boss and Uzair for each Rent Contract installment. Adnan outbound is blocked.

displayDescription.en: sends 15-day-ahead WhatsApp reminders to boss and Uzair for each Rent Contract installment. Adnan outbound is blocked.
displayDescription.ar: يرسل تذكيرات مبكرة لأقساط عقود الإيجار إلى Eng. Muhammad وعزير.

automations.name: Truck Arrival Alert
automations.description: Alerts delivery group 30 min before a truck reaches its destination. Runs 24/7 for overnight long-distance trips.

displayDescription.en: Alerts delivery group 30 min before a truck reaches its destination. Runs 24/7 for overnight long-distance trips.
displayDescription.ar: ينبه مجموعة التوصيل قبل وصول الشاحنة إلى الوجهة بنحو 30 دقيقة.

automations.name: Unengaged Trucks Reminder
automations.description: Reminds delivery group every 3 hours about trucks with no active Delivery Trip today.

displayDescription.en: Reminds delivery group every 3 hours about trucks with no active Delivery Trip today.
displayDescription.ar: ينبه مجموعة التوصيل بالشاحنات التي لا يوجد لها رحلة تسليم نشطة اليوم.

automations.name: Oil Change Checker
automations.description: Alerts delivery group when a truck exceeds 9,000 km since last oil change. Uses Vehicle Log odometer data.

displayDescription.en: Alerts delivery group when a truck exceeds 9,000 km since last oil change. Uses Vehicle Log odometer data.
displayDescription.ar: ينبه عند تجاوز الشاحنة حد الكيلومترات منذ آخر تغيير زيت.

automations.name: Marketing Weekly Content Planning
automations.description: Saturday 9AM: plans the next week's content calendar and posts it to BCI Marketing group for batch approval.

displayDescription.en: Saturday 9AM: plans the next week's content calendar and posts it to BCI Marketing group for batch approval.
displayDescription.ar: يجهز خطة محتوى الأسبوع التالي ويرسلها لمجموعة تسويق BCI للاعتماد.
يرسل طلبات منشورات التقويم التسويقي اليومية إلى شاكر.

automations.name: Morning Briefing
automations.description: Sends daily 8 AM curated brief to Eng. Muhammad: collections due, pending approvals, sales snapshot, yesterday's recap.

displayDescription.en: Sends daily 8 AM curated brief to Eng. Muhammad: collections due, pending approvals, sales snapshot, yesterday's recap.
displayDescription.ar: يرسل لـ Eng. Muhammad ملخصاً يومياً عن التحصيل والاعتمادات والمبيعات وما تم أمس.

automations.name: Collections Intelligence Brief
automations.description: Daily 10 AM deep-dive into overdue receivables: aging buckets, top 10 debtors, chase priority list. Arabic, to Eng. Muhammad DM.

displayDescription.en: Daily 10 AM deep-dive into overdue receivables: aging buckets, top 10 debtors, chase priority list. Arabic, to Eng. Muhammad DM.
displayDescription.ar: يرسل تحليل الفواتير المتأخرة وأولويات التحصيل وأكبر العملاء المتأخرين.

automations.name: PO Approval Notifier
automations.description: Every 10 min from 08:00 to 17:59 Asia/Riyadh: refreshes the pending_actions registry and pushes any newly-pending PO to Eng. Muhammad via WhatsApp for quick-reply approval.

displayDescription.en: Every 10 min from 08:00 to 17:59 Asia/Riyadh: refreshes the pending_actions registry and pushes any newly-pending PO to Eng. Muhammad via WhatsApp for quick-reply approval.
displayDescription.ar: يتابع أوامر الشراء التي تنتظر اعتماد Eng. Muhammad ويرسلها للرد السريع.

automations.name: APC PO Notifier -> Anas
automations.description: Every 30 min 08:00-17:00: sends new APC Purchase Orders to Anas (APC manager) via WhatsApp.

displayName.ar: تنبيه أوامر شراء APC إلى أنس

displayDescription.en: Every 30 min 08:00-17:00: sends new APC Purchase Orders to Anas (APC manager) via WhatsApp.
displayDescription.ar: يرسل أوامر شراء APC الجديدة إلى أنس عبر واتساب.
يحدث سجل أوامر الشراء التي تنتظر الاعتماد.

automations.name: Marketing Watchdog - Every 2 Hours Business Hours
automations.description: Sun-Thu every 2 hours 9AM-5PM Riyadh: reminds boss about pending marketing approvals with varied value-based nudges, checks overdue tasks, and stays silent if nothing needs action.

displayName.en: Marketing Watchdog - Every 2 Hours Business Hours

displayDescription.en: Sun-Thu every 2 hours 9AM-5PM Riyadh: reminds boss about pending marketing approvals with varied value-based nudges, checks overdue tasks, and stays silent if nothing needs action.
displayDescription.ar: يذكر Eng. Muhammad بالاعتمادات التسويقية المعلقة ويتابع المهام المتأخرة.

automations.name: End-of-Day Summary
automations.description: Sends daily 6 PM scorecard to Eng. Muhammad: today's completed work, approvals, still-pending items.

displayDescription.en: Sends daily 6 PM scorecard to Eng. Muhammad: today's completed work, approvals, still-pending items.
displayDescription.ar: يرسل بطاقة نهاية اليوم: ما تم إنجازه، الاعتمادات، والعناصر التي ما زالت معلقة.

automations.name: Salesman Overdue Collections
automations.description: Daily 1 PM reminder to each BCI salesman about overdue customer collections on their accounts. Moved from morning bundle (08:00 hook + 09:30 quote follow-up was already two messages); collections is the heaviest, lands in post-lunch admin slot when salesmen have energy for chasing money rather than starting the day with bad news.

displayDescription.en: Daily 1 PM reminder to each BCI salesman about overdue customer collections on their accounts. Moved from morning bundle (08:00 hook + 09:30 quote follow-up was already two messages); collections is the heaviest, lands in post-lunch admin slot when salesmen have energy for chasing money rather than starting the day with bad news.
displayDescription.ar: يرسل تذكيراً يومياً لكل مندوب BCI عن العملاء المتأخرين في السداد ضمن حساباته.

automations.name: Rental Overdue Checker
automations.description: Daily 09:00 Asia/Riyadh: scans SH (Sharafat Aliemar) rental contracts. Sends boss overdue digest; reminds tenants 15d/3d before due date, on due date, then every 3d overdue until paid. Tenant replies route to rental-tenant support.

displayDescription.en: Daily 09:00 Asia/Riyadh: scans SH (Sharafat Aliemar) rental contracts. Sends boss overdue digest; reminds tenants 15d/3d before due date, on due date, then every 3d overdue until paid. Tenant replies route to rental-tenant support.
displayDescription.ar: يفحص عقود الإيجار ويرسل ملخص المتأخرات وتذكيرات المستأجرين حسب مواعيد الاستحقاق.

automations.name: APC/BCI Rental Payment Reminder
automations.description: Daily 08:30 Asia/Riyadh (no Friday): approved APC/BCI Rental Contracts — reminds HR group about rent installments + electricity bills at 30/7/3/1 days before due and on due date (skips rows already Paid, re-checked fresh each run), overdue nudge every 3d until paid, lease expiry notices at 90/30/7/0 days before end_date.

displayDescription.en: Daily 08:30 Asia/Riyadh (no Friday): approved APC/BCI Rental Contracts — reminds HR group about rent installments + electricity bills at 30/7/3/1 days before due and on due date (skips rows already Paid, re-checked fresh each run), overdue nudge every 3d until paid, lease expiry notices at 90/30/7/0 days before end_date.
displayDescription.ar: ينبه مجموعة الموارد البشرية بأقساط الإيجار وفواتير الكهرباء قبل الاستحقاق.

automations.name: RFQ Email Poller
automations.description: Enabled 2026-05-19 (Adyan): supplier email outbound + inbound channels live.

displayDescription.en: Enabled 2026-05-19 (Adyan): supplier email outbound + inbound channels live.
displayDescription.ar: يتابع رسائل الموردين الصادرة والواردة الخاصة بطلبات عروض الأسعار.

automations.name: RFQ Group Notifier Safety Net
automations.description: Catches up any po_drafted RFQ rounds whose group/boss notification was missed (e.g. fire-and-forget subprocess killed). Idempotent.

displayDescription.en: Catches up any po_drafted RFQ rounds whose group/boss notification was missed (e.g. fire-and-forget subprocess killed). Idempotent.
displayDescription.ar: يلتقط أي جولة RFQ تم تجهيزها ولم يصل تنبيهها للمجموعة أو لصاحب القرار.

automations.name: Boss Dashboard - Regenerate
automations.description: Read-only file write, safe on Fridays.

displayDescription.en: Read-only file write, safe on Fridays.
displayDescription.ar: يعيد توليد بيانات لوحة المتابعة بشكل دوري.

automations.name: Etimad Tender Watcher
automations.description: Daily 08:00: scrapes tenders.etimad.sa for new public tenders, filters to APC scope (Building Construction + Civil Works, all KSA), sends Arabic voice + text digest to boss DM. Friday-gated. Boss-DM preview phase before pushing to projects group.

displayDescription.en: Daily 08:00: scrapes tenders.etimad.sa for new public tenders, filters to APC scope (Building Construction + Civil Works, all KSA), sends Arabic voice + text digest to boss DM. Friday-gated. Boss-DM preview phase before pushing to projects group.
displayDescription.ar: يفحص مناقصات اعتماد العامة ويبلغ Eng. Muhammad بالمناقصات المناسبة لنطاق APC.

automations.name: HR Fleet Document Expiry Reminder
automations.description: Sends all due expired documents.

displayName.ar: تذكير انتهاء وثائق الأسطول للموارد البشرية

displayDescription.en: Sends all due expired documents.
displayDescription.ar: يرسل وثائق الأسطول المنتهية أو القريبة من الانتهاء إلى مجموعة الموارد البشرية.

automations.name: HR Employee Iqama + Contract Expiry Reminder
automations.description: Iqama alerts at 7 and 1 days before expiry; a weekly Tuesday digest of currently-expired iqamas (recently-expired listed, older backlog counted); contract renewal alerts at 65 and 61 days before contract_end_date (61-day only if not yet renewed), for employees that have a contract and do not have renewal disabled.

displayName.en: HR Employee Iqama + Contract Expiry Reminder

displayDescription.en: Iqama alerts at 7 and 1 days before expiry; a weekly Tuesday digest of currently-expired iqamas (recently-expired listed, older backlog counted); contract renewal alerts at 65 and 61 days before contract_end_date (61-day only if not yet renewed), for employees that have a contract and do not have renewal disabled.
displayDescription.ar: ينبه قبل انتهاء الإقامات والعقود ويرسل ملخصاً أسبوعياً للمنتهي منها.

automations.name: Fleet Accident Follow-up
automations.description: Every 2 working-hours Sunday-Thursday: follows open Fleet Incident Details accident cases from local state, reminds the HR group for Najm/Taqdeer/claim/payment/legal next steps, and keeps timing metadata out of ERP. (Moved fleet group -> HR group 2026-06-09; HR group is now the primary home for the accident workflow, fleet group remains a fallback for reports.)

displayDescription.en: Every 2 working-hours Sunday-Thursday: follows open Fleet Incident Details accident cases from local state, reminds the HR group for Najm/Taqdeer/claim/payment/legal next steps, and keeps timing metadata out of ERP. (Moved fleet group -> HR group 2026-06-09; HR group is now the primary home for the accident workflow, fleet group remains a fallback for reports.)
displayDescription.ar: يتابع حالات الحوادث المفتوحة ويذكر مجموعة الموارد البشرية بخطوات نجم وتقدير والمطالبة.

automations.name: LinkedIn Safe Auto Daily
automations.description: Daily 8:30 Riyadh: uses on BCI LinkedIn Page Admin, sends limited safe outreach/replies, and alerts boss for important items.

displayDescription.en: Daily 8:30 Riyadh: uses on BCI LinkedIn Page Admin, sends limited safe outreach/replies, and alerts boss for important items.
displayDescription.ar: ينفذ تفاعلات محدودة وآمنة على صفحة LinkedIn الخاصة بـ BCI وينبه Eng. Muhammad عند وجود أمر مهم.

automations.name: Gateway Watchdog
automations.description: Every 5 min: probes the OpenClaw gateway WhatsApp listener. Alerts Adyan via Telegram (direct HTTPS, no gateway dependency) after 10 min down, escalates to Telegram+Twilio SMS after 60 min down, repeats critical hourly, and sends a single 'recovered' message when the listener comes back. NO failureAlert via WhatsApp — that's the channel it watches.

displayDescription.en: Every 5 min: probes the OpenClaw gateway WhatsApp listener. Alerts Adyan via Telegram (direct HTTPS, no gateway dependency) after 10 min down, escalates to Telegram+Twilio SMS after 60 min down, repeats critical hourly, and sends a single 'recovered' message when the listener comes back. NO failureAlert via WhatsApp — that's the channel it watches.
displayDescription.ar: يفحص جاهزية بوابة OpenClaw وواتساب وينبه عند توقفها.

automations.name: Support Collections Queue Refresh
automations.description: Every hour 08-17 Asia/Riyadh: reads ERP Accounts Receivable and writes a sanitized pending-payment queue for the separate support OpenClaw. No WhatsApp sends.

displayDescription.en: Every hour 08-17 Asia/Riyadh: reads ERP Accounts Receivable and writes a sanitized pending-payment queue for the separate support OpenClaw. No WhatsApp sends.
displayDescription.ar: يقرأ الذمم المدينة من ERP ويجهز قائمة مدفوعات معلقة نظيفة لنظام الدعم المنفصل.

automations.name: Item Price Reply Promoter
automations.description: Idempotent; safe to re-run.

displayDescription.en: Idempotent; safe to re-run.
displayDescription.ar: يعالج ردود أسعار الموردين بشكل آمن وقابل لإعادة التشغيل.

when.en: Every 10 min during work hours (not Fri)
when.ar: كل 10 دقيقة خلال ساعات العمل (عدا الجمعة)

automations.name: Item Price Outreach - Every 5h (drain BCI supplier price gap)
automations.description: every 5 hours (skip Friday). Batches ~50 supplier emails per run; rate-limited by Zoho naturally. Gap-compute is idempotent; deferred suppliers are picked up automatically on the next run. Drains the 320-supplier price-list backlog over ~25h, then continues filling gaps as new items / suppliers appear.

displayName.en: Item Price Outreach - Every 5h (drain BCI supplier price gap)

displayDescription.en: every 5 hours (skip Friday). Batches ~50 supplier emails per run; rate-limited by Zoho naturally. Gap-compute is idempotent; deferred suppliers are picked up automatically on the next run. Drains the 320-supplier price-list backlog over ~25h, then continues filling gaps as new items / suppliers appear.
displayDescription.ar: يرسل دفعات من طلبات تحديث الأسعار للموردين لسد فجوات أسعار مواد BCI.

automations.name: Boss Instruction Instant Watcher
automations.description: Every minute except Friday: checks recently modified boss-owned Instruction From Sales Management To Staff records and WhatsApp-notifies the assigned employee about newly added task rows for today.

displayDescription.en: Every minute except Friday: checks recently modified boss-owned Instruction From Sales Management To Staff records and WhatsApp-notifies the assigned employee about newly added task rows for today.
displayDescription.ar: يتابع تعليمات Eng. Muhammad الجديدة أو المعدلة ويبلغ الموظف المعني فوراً.

automations.name: Boss Instruction Reminder
automations.description: Daily 14:00 Asia/Riyadh except Friday: checks open boss-owned Instruction From Sales Management To Staff records and WhatsApp-notifies each assigned employee about today's task rows only, with the ERP list link.

displayDescription.en: Daily 14:00 Asia/Riyadh except Friday: checks open boss-owned Instruction From Sales Management To Staff records and WhatsApp-notifies each assigned employee about today's task rows only, with the ERP list link.
displayDescription.ar: يتابع التعليمات المفتوحة ويرسل تذكيراً للموظفين المعنيين.

when.ar: كل يوم بعد الظهر عند 14:00 (عدا الجمعة)

automations.name: Salesman Material Request Watcher
automations.description: Every 5 min Asia/Riyadh, all 7 days (no Friday gate, boss wants full coverage): watches ERP Salesman Material Request status. Open notifies boss (Arabic); Sent to Store notifies active Store Person(s) of the source warehouse (English, Arabic override for Roushdy); Received notifies salesman + boss (Arabic). Per-doc/per-state/per-recipient dedup; first rollout bootstrapped to avoid backlog spam.

displayDescription.en: Every 5 min Asia/Riyadh, all 7 days (no Friday gate, boss wants full coverage): watches ERP Salesman Material Request status. Open notifies boss (Arabic); Sent to Store notifies active Store Person(s) of the source warehouse (English, Arabic override for Roushdy); Received notifies salesman + boss (Arabic). Per-doc/per-state/per-recipient dedup; first rollout bootstrapped to avoid backlog spam.
displayDescription.ar: يتابع حالة طلبات مواد المندوبين في ERP ويبلغ Eng. Muhammad أو المندوب حسب المرحلة.

automations.name: Cash Receipt Group Watcher
automations.description: Every minute Asia/Riyadh, all 7 days: watches ERP Cash Receipt lifecycle and announces ERP-recorded receipt, driver received, and accountant received milestones to the relevant BCI delivery/store WhatsApp group. Draft/created receipts stay silent. Per-doc/per-stage/group dedup; first rollout bootstrapped to avoid backlog spam.

displayDescription.en: Every minute Asia/Riyadh, all 7 days: watches ERP Cash Receipt lifecycle and announces ERP-recorded receipt, driver received, and accountant received milestones to the relevant BCI delivery/store WhatsApp group. Draft/created receipts stay silent. Per-doc/per-stage/group dedup; first rollout bootstrapped to avoid backlog spam.
displayDescription.ar: يتابع دورة سند القبض في ERP ويعلن مراحل التسجيل والاستلام.

automations.name: Employee Daily Activity Report Reminder
automations.description: Daily 16:30 and 17:30 Asia/Riyadh except Friday: reminds active Office Staff Rakah - BCI employees who have not submitted today's Employee Daily Activity Report.

displayDescription.en: Daily 16:30 and 17:30 Asia/Riyadh except Friday: reminds active Office Staff Rakah - BCI employees who have not submitted today's Employee Daily Activity Report.
displayDescription.ar: يذكر موظفي المكتب النشطين الذين لم يرسلوا تقرير النشاط اليومي.

automations.name: Technical Support Notifier - Every 5 min 08-17
automations.description: Bridges the Technical Support thread: notifies Asim of new requests + completions (English) and the salesman of technical replies/comments (Arabic). Polls ERP docs + comments.

displayDescription.en: Bridges the Technical Support thread: notifies Asim of new requests + completions (English) and the salesman of technical replies/comments (Arabic). Polls ERP docs + comments.
displayDescription.ar: ينبه عاصم بطلبات الدعم الجديدة والمكتملة، وينبه المندوب بردود الدعم الفني.

automations.name: Boss Instruction Reply Watcher
automations.description: Every minute except Friday: watches ERP comments on boss-owned Instruction From Sales Management To Staff records. Staff replies notify boss; boss replies notify the assigned employee.

displayDescription.en: Every minute except Friday: watches ERP comments on boss-owned Instruction From Sales Management To Staff records. Staff replies notify boss; boss replies notify the assigned employee.
displayDescription.ar: يتابع تعليقات تعليمات Eng. Muhammad في ERP وينقل ردود الموظفين أو ردود Eng. Muhammad للطرف المناسب.

desc.en: Team status may be stale until Mission Control is back online
desc.ar: قد تكون حالة الفريق غير محدثة حتى يعود الاتصال
